title: DDS Division Staff Totals by Year (CTHRU-derived)
description: Annual headcount totals for the DDS-Determination (DDS-Det) division within MassAbility/MRC, aggregated from Massachusetts CTHRU public payroll data (department filter MRC). Covers calendar years 2010–2023. Tracks per year: total Vocational Disability Examiners (VDE, all grades), Medical Consultants, the full DDS division headcount, and the broader MRC agency total. A disambiguation record for the separate Department of Developmental Services is present but out of 509 scope.
unit_of_observation: DDS division (MassAbility/MRC), one record per calendar year

columns.name: vde_total
columns.description: Total VDEs (all grades) in CTHRU payroll for the year.

columns.name: medical_consultants
columns.description: Medical Consultant positions in CTHRU for the year.

columns.name: dds_division_total
columns.description: Total DDS-Det division headcount (all DDS titles incl. VDEs, Medical Consultants, leadership) for the year.

columns.name: mrc_agency_total
columns.description: Total MassAbility/MRC agency-wide headcount in CTHRU for the year.

notes: Aggregated from CTHRU public payroll by the repo maintainer (CTHRU is the authoritative upstream). 2016 counts are inflated by a VDE title reclassification (old A/B/C/D and new I/II/III concurrent). CY2024 not yet in CTHRU as of 2026-05; CTHRU lag ~6+ months after year end.
